title: battle of the sexes by The Snowflowers
description: Exploring gender dynamics and relationship struggles.
lyrics: In my battle of the sexes Ain't nobody really winnin' In my battle of the sexes Don't be countin' your blitzes Don't be all in your blunts In my battle of the sexes Ain't nobody really winnin' In my battle of the sexes From the beginning of time, it's like I'm lost in you It's like I'm lost in the things you do Now you see, I just wanna compliment that and be better But then I sit back, thinkin' bout the edda Thinkin' bout the edge and havin' you not there Wanna make a fight, man, make you understand Come man and stay with me Don't fuck my heart up, but I know that It's a battle, it's a battle I'm expectin' In my battle of the sexes Ain't nobody really winnin' In my battle of the sexes Don't be countin' your blitzes Don't be all in your blunts In my battle of the sexes I'm flyin' with me and when we're flyin' I'm a-goin' We're ridin' the blues, man, you know that we knowin' That it takes you to tango, it takes us To fight each other, then it's just tough enough It's just tough enough to be snuffed, you're done There's nothing that I can do inside my heart Cause when we broke out, it shut up, it shut down Until we forgive each other, man, it come around, but In my battle of the sexes Don't be countin' your blitzes Don't be all in your blunts In my battle of the sexes Oh, oh, oh, I like that sound Comin' together, empathy around, and our hearts alone I swear that didn't know I'm an outsider Can't live without this, I'm in the bitter Don't get bitter, just know it's all you Ain't nobody really winning It's a battle, it's a battle of respect, yeah It's a battle, it's a battle of respect, yeah Go battle of the sexes Make my way on to serenity Go time Go battle of the sexes Ain't nobody really winning It's a battle, it's a battle of respect, yeah
